motion_system: staggered crossfade trails, direction-aware arcs, and latency ripples moving through a fixed engraved town plan
color_drift: warm parchment and graphite drift toward muted civic green, low brass, coral sparks, cyan pulses, and firework gold
glow_behavior: small controlled glows leak from waveform glass, voice apertures, room thresholds, and pixel-firework bursts without washing out the ink
